description_long: This cement mixer features a tall, conical drum made of dark metal, capped with a circular lid and supported by a sturdy, decorative wrought iron frame. The drum tapers to a narrow point at the bottom, suggesting a gravity-fed discharge system, and is held upright by two vertical supports connected by horizontal bars. The frame includes ornate scrollwork at the base, providing both stability and an industrial aesthetic. The lid on top appears to be removable, likely for loading cement and other materials. The overall construction is robust, with visible rivets and joints reinforcing the metal surfaces. The object has a weathered, matte finish, indicating frequent use in outdoor or construction environments.
description: A tall, conical metal cement mixer with a circular lid, supported by a decorative wrought iron frame and a narrow discharge point at the bottom.
description_view_0: Front view showing the conical drum, circular lid, and straight support frame with horizontal bars.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ornate scrollwork at the base and the narrow discharge point of the drum.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the drum and support frame visible, but less detail on the scrollwork.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the decorative scrollwork and the conical shape of the drum.
